description: Emelia is an affordable B2B prospecting tool for cold email and LinkedIn outreach, with email warm-up, an email finder, and Sales Navigator scraping.
overview: Emelia handles cold email and LinkedIn outreach in one platform, with email warm-up, an email finder, and Sales Navigator scraping, positioned as a lower-cost option.
what_is: Emelia is a growth and prospecting tool for automated lead generation and outreach. It finds leads and contacts them by email and LinkedIn, with data extraction from Sales Navigator, and is known for being simple and competitively priced.

It is strongest at cold email campaigns and LinkedIn outreach, with features like automated messaging, A/B testing, and warm-up that improve deliverability. Personalized campaigns can start producing results within days.

Emelia integrates with CRMs like HubSpot and Pipedrive and automation platforms like Zapier and Make. It focuses on prospecting, contact automation, and enrichment rather than managing complex sales pipelines.
